class.name: fleet_nav2_bt/CheckFleetConflict
class.description: Check if robot has fleet coordination conflict with peers. Outputs fleet_state to blackboard.

class.name: fleet_nav2_bt/WaitForYieldClear
class.description: Wait for yield clear during fleet coordination. Publishes zero velocity and ACK_YIELD until RESUME received or timeout.

class.name: fleet_nav2_bt/AdjustSpeedForFleet
class.description: Adjust speed for fleet coordination. Modulates child node speed based on fleet state.
